# shouldColorMatch()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether or not the image source should be color matched.

## Declaration

```swift
func shouldColorMatch() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if the source is a mask or gradient; [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] otherwise.

## Getting Color Space Information

- **imageColorSpace()**: Returns the color space of the image source.
